subcodes.first_line: O maidservant at the Threshold of Divine Unity! Give thanks unto God that the light of guidance hath shone forth and the chamber of the heart is bright and illumined [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای کنیز درگاه احدیت شکر کن خدا را که نور هدایت تابید شبستان دل روشن و منور
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @being a source of light; guidance, @praise and encouragement
